params.name: Ult. Traveler Manual
params.description:
On Dec 15, 2021 AD, several travelers solemnly pledged to record all their research results without reservation.
This handbook is not written by Earth's Will but instead, jointly written by some powerful travelers. They have found that their growth has reached a bottleneck, and to continue to grow stronger, they may have to touch upon what's forbidden by Earth's Will. Because this path is too dangerous, and one might die easily, they recorded their exploration results, hoping to provide some …
